title: Bitter Velvety Croatian Shredded Coconut Stir-fry
description: A savory and velvety Croatian dish featuring shredded coconut with a hint of bitterness that can serve as an effective hangover cure when consumed in moderation.

ingredients.name: 1 cup shredded coconut (unsweetened)
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's unsweetened for a bitter flavor profile.

instructions: In a large bowl, mix the shredded coconut with lemon juice, dried dill, minced onion, garlic, and black pepper. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Heat olive oil in a wok or non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Once hot, add the mixture from step 1 to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until heated through.
Stir continuously as it cooks to prevent burning and to achieve that velvety texture. Adjust seasoning with additional lemon juice if needed.
